zh.The Parish Church of Saint Matthew, Nort: 英國英格蘭越可爾諾萊安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Barstow於1555年3月15日出生在英國越可爾諾萊安時，他的父親Richard Barstowe35歲，母親Margaret Oldfield32歲。他於1575年與Elizabeth Valentine Stace在英國英格蘭越可爾諾萊安結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1595年在他的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國越可爾諾萊安。

zh-hans.The Parish Church of Saint Matthew, Nort: 英国英格兰越可爾諾萊安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Barstow于1555年3月15日出生在英国越可爾諾萊安时，他的父亲Richard Barstowe35岁，母亲Margaret Oldfield32岁。他于1575年与Elizabeth Valentine Stace在英国英格兰越可爾諾萊安结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1595年在他的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在英国越可爾諾萊安。

nameMeanings.name: Barstow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from a lost place called Bairstow in Southowram, Yorkshire, probably named with Old English beger ‘berry’ + stōw ‘place’. The surname is still most common in Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Barstow was born on 15 March 1555, in Northowram, Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard Barstowe, was 35 and his mother, Margaret Oldfield, was 32. He married Elizabeth Valentine Stace in 1575, in Northowram, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died about 1595, in his hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Northowram, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Barstow est né le 15 mars 1555, à Northowram, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard Barstowe, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Oldfield, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Valentine Stace en 1575, à Northowram, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé environ 1595, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Northowram, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Barstow am 15. März 1555 in Northowram, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Barstowe 35 und seine Mutter Margaret Oldfield 32. Er hat 1575 in Northowram, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Valentine Stace geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 1595 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Northowram, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Barstow è nato il il 15 marzo 1555 nel Northowram, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Barstowe, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Oldfield, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Valentine Stace nel 1575, nel Northowram, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1595, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Northowram, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Barstowが1555年3月15日にイギリスヨークシュアイアノーソウラムで生まれた時，父Richard Barstoweは35歳，母Margaret Oldfieldは32歳であった。1575年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアノーソウラムでElizabeth Valentine Staceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は約1595年に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアノーソウラムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Barstow(이)가 1555년 3월 15일 영국 요르크실르 노르토램에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Barstowe(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Oldfield(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1575년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노르토램에서 Elizabeth Valentine Stace(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1595년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 노르토램에 묻혔다.

mn.The Parish Church of Saint Matthew, Nort: Northowram, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Barstow nasceu em 15 de março de 1555, em Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Barstowe, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Oldfield, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Valentine Stace em 1575, em Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1595, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Barstow родился 15 марта 1555 г. в местности нортоурам, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Barstowe было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Oldfield, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Valentine Stace в 1575 г. в местности нортоурам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер около 1595 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности нортоурам, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Barstow nació el 15 de marzo de 1555, en Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Barstowe, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Oldfield, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Valentine Stace en 1575, en Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1595, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
